columns.name: total_charges
columns.resolved_expression: SELECT HSP_ACCOUNT_ID, SUM(CASE WHEN TX_TYPE_C = 1 THEN TX_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END) AS total_charges, SUM(CASE WHEN TX_TYPE_C = 2 THEN TX_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END) AS total_payments FROM HSP_TRANSACTIONS GROUP BY HSP_ACCOUNT_ID.total_charges
base_columns: SELECT HSP_ACCOUNT_ID, SUM(CASE WHEN TX_TYPE_C = 1 THEN TX_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END) AS total_charges, SUM(CASE WHEN TX_TYPE_C = 2 THEN TX_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END) AS total_payments FROM HSP_TRANSACTIONS GROUP BY HSP_ACCOUNT_ID.total_charges

columns.name: collection_rate_pct
columns.resolved_expression: CASE WHEN t.total_charges = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(t.total_payments / t.total_charges * 100, 1) END
columns.direct_expression: CASE WHEN t.total_charges = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(t.total_payments / t.total_charges * 100, 1) END AS collection_rate_pct
base_columns: SELECT HSP_ACCOUNT_ID, SUM(CASE WHEN TX_TYPE_C = 1 THEN TX_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END) AS total_charges, SUM(CASE WHEN TX_TYPE_C = 2 THEN TX_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END) AS total_payments FROM HSP_TRANSACTIONS GROUP BY HSP_ACCOUNT_ID.total_charges

columns.name: los_category
columns.resolved_expression: CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(DAY, e.HOSP_ADMSN_TIME, e.HOSP_DISCH_TIME) <= 2 THEN 'Short' WHEN DATEDIFF(DAY, e.HOSP_ADMSN_TIME, e.HOSP_DISCH_TIME) <= 5 THEN 'Medium' WHEN DATEDIFF(DAY, e.HOSP_ADMSN_TIME, e.HOSP_DISCH_TIME) <= 10 THEN 'Long' ELSE 'Extended' END
columns.direct_expression: CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(DAY, e.HOSP_ADMSN_TIME, e.HOSP_DISCH_TIME) <= 2 THEN 'Short' WHEN DATEDIFF(DAY, e.HOSP_ADMSN_TIME, e.HOSP_DISCH_TIME) <= 5 THEN 'Medium' WHEN DATEDIFF(DAY, e.HOSP_ADMSN_TIME, e.HOSP_DISCH_TIME) <= 10 THEN 'Long' ELSE 'Extended' END AS los_category
